LightningComponentBundle.description: Wireframe-style placeholder used by VBOT FlexiPages. Variant auto-derives from the tabLabel; phaseLabel renders the cosmetic badge. Replaced phase-by-phase as real LWCs land.

property.name: tabLabel
property.label: Tab Label
property.description: Label shown in heading; also drives which wireframe variant is rendered.

property.name: variant
property.label: Wireframe Variant
property.description: One of: auto, service-warranty, upgrades, connected-asset, generic. 'auto' derives from tabLabel.

property.name: phaseLabel
property.label: Phase Label
property.description: Cosmetic phase marker shown in the corner badge.
